params.name: Frankenstein
params.description:
On Mar 3, 1818 AD, British author Shelley completed the creation of Frankenstein.
The protagonist of the novel Frankenstein is a biologist who is passionate about the origin of life. He tries to conquer death and create a new life by wandering around the corpses and trying to piece together a huge human body using different parts of the corpses. When he successfully creates a monster, he does not feel happy, but rather a series of strange and mysterious murders. From Frankenstein, we can see …
